rows.description: Computus Joannis Conybeare Rectoris a 2do Die Novembris 1730 ad eundem Diem revolutum 1731.
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for header type and description. No amounts. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Consensus on header type and no amounts. GPT-5-mini's description preferred for accuracy as visual inspection shows no trailing period.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Consensus across both extractors. Visual inspection confirms 26 pounds, 12 shillings, 9 pence, and a clear 'ob' mark for 0.5 fraction. Gemini-flash's note regarding clarity is more accurate.

Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection reveals the description is 'Minhinset'. GPT-5-mini was closer with 'Minhinsett' than gemini-flash's 'Minhinnet'. Corrected spelling based on visual verification.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms the description is 'South Newington Rect:'. Gemini-flash was closer with 'Rect.' but missed the colon; gpt-5-mini read 'Recd.', which is incorrect.

Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Cudlington Rect:' is accurate, including the colon. Gpt-5-mini's 'Cuddington Recd.' is incorrect in both spelling and abbreviation.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Chase Hill' (with a space) is accurate. Gpt-5-mini's hyphenated version is incorrect.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.

Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Due Quit Rents' (starting with a clear 'D') is accurate. Gpt-5-mini's 'Tue Quit Rents' is a misreading of the initial 'D'.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Ralph Marshals Capons' is accurate. Gemini-flash's 'Carons' is a misreading of the 'p'.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Calicot alias Lane' is accurate. Gemini-flash's 'Caleb' is a misreading of the middle letters.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Leaden-Hall' is accurate, including the hyphen. Gemini-flash's 'Seaden - Hall' misreads the initial 'L' for an 'S'.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Consensus across both extractors. Visual inspection confirms 4 pounds, 1 shilling, 8 pence, and a clear 'ob' mark for 0.5 fraction. Gemini-flash's note regarding clarity is more accurate.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Clifton Penny' is accurate. The initial letter of the second word is a 'P', not an 'F'.

Consensus across both extractors. Visual inspection confirms 7 pounds, 9 shillings, 11 pence, and a clear 'ob' mark for 0.5 fraction. Gemini-flash's note regarding clarity is more accurate. Description hyphenation also correct.

Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection favors gemini-flash's 'Tretherwen'. The initial letter is stylized but resembles a 'T' more than a 'P'. Gpt-5-mini's 'Prittcheven' is a less plausible reading.

Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Ladlane, Sparkes et Meriton' is accurate. Gemini-flash misread the first word as 'In & Lane' and the last word as 'Merton'.
Consensus across both extractors for all values. Confirmed by visual inspection.
Amounts are consensual. Visual inspection confirms gpt-5-mini's description 'Back Gate, Boyse' is accurate. Gemini-flash misread 'Back' as 'Buck'.
